required_preferences.fact: Uses a meditation app both in the morning and before bed to manage anxiety and nerves during public speaking prep — evening sessions are now routine during event lead-up

supersedes.fact: Uses a meditation app every morning immediately after waking — never meditates in the evening

required_preferences.fact: Plans local getaways around company holiday weekends or PTO — open to 4–5 day trips, no longer restricted by continuous freelance client deliverables

supersedes.fact: Plans one local getaway per quarter — never books trips lasting more than three days due to client responsibilities

required_preferences.fact: Prefers splitting meal prep and cooking duties with family during brother’s rehab weekends, putting her usual Sunday meal prepping on hold when visiting
Eliminates evening caffeine and large meals after 8pm to support CPAP therapy and improve sleep quality, regardless of work demands or social plans.
Prefers gentle park walks and nature outings with her roommate for stress relief, avoiding strenuous activity until wrist heals
Performs prescribed daily physical therapy exercises for her wrist at set times; treats this as a non-negotiable self-care routine

persona: A 24-year-old mobile app developer freelancing full-time
